narrative:
Lodi Township (precinct in Athens County) has 972 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
